programs.title: The World According To Grandpa
programs.desc: Stanley asks 'What are rainbows made of?' and Grandpa spins one of his tall tales about Wiswell the Witch who needed to collect seven magical items to make an extra special potion.

programs.title: Chums
programs.desc: Romper is feeling sick, and the Chums try to make her feel better by bringing her different foods and flowers.

programs.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programs.desc: The final country on the Mekong's journey is Vietnam, the home of the river's mighty delta. This area is a true biological treasure trove.

programs.title: NITV News Update
programs.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programs.title: Ocean Warriors
programs.desc: The Kitkatla Coastal Nation's crew answer a call for assistance from an injured Sea-Doo operator flipped over by a wave.

programs.title: Ocean Warriors
programs.desc: Kitkatla's Coast Guard Auxiliary Search and Rescue team rush to deal with a Medical Emergency on a runaway tour boat.
